AWSBedrock.short_description: Crawl AWS Bedrock docs and generate multi-strategy chunks for retrieval.

ui.title: Run AWS Bedrock Ingest Workflow
ui.description: Use this workflow to crawl the AWS Bedrock documentation and create chunk outputs for each configured strategy.
ui.short_description: Crawl AWS Bedrock docs and create chunked artifacts.

fields.label: Seed URL
fields.description: Starting page URL for the web crawler.
fields.help: The crawler begins at this URL and follows links up to the configured depth and page limits. For HTML documentation, use the top-level page of the section you want to ingest.

fields.label: Max tokens per chunk
fields.help: Controls chunk size for downstream retrieval. Smaller chunks (200–400) give precise retrieval; larger chunks (800–2000) preserve more context. Uses the cl100k_base tokenizer.

fields.label: Overlap tokens
fields.help: Overlapping tokens help preserve context at chunk boundaries. Typical overlap is 10–20% of max_tokens. Set to 0 for no overlap.

fields.label: Max pages
fields.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl.
fields.help: Limits the total pages fetched from the seed URL domain. The crawler stops after reaching this count regardless of remaining links.

fields.label: Max crawl depth
fields.description: Maximum link depth from the seed URL.
fields.help: Depth 0 = seed page only. Depth 1 = seed + pages linked from seed. Depth 2 = two hops from seed, etc. Higher depth discovers more content but takes longer.

fields.label: Timeout seconds
fields.help: How long to wait for each page to respond before skipping it. Increase for slow servers; decrease to fail fast on unresponsive pages.

fields.label: Allowed domains
fields.description: Restrict crawling to these domains (one per line).
fields.help: Only pages on listed domains will be fetched. Leave empty to allow all domains reachable from the seed URL.

fields.label: Allowed path prefixes
fields.description: Only crawl URLs matching these path prefixes (one per line).
fields.help: Filters URLs by path prefix to focus on a specific documentation section. E.g., "/bedrock/latest/userguide/" limits crawling to that subdirectory.

fields.label: Chunking methods
fields.help: Each method produces a separate set of chunks. Running multiple strategies lets you compare retrieval quality. Select only the methods relevant to your use case.

fields.label: Query terms
fields.description: Terms for query-aware chunking (one per line).
fields.help: Used only by the "query_aware" chunking method. Chunks are scored and split to maximize relevance to these terms.

fields.label: Fetch again
fields.description: Re-crawl even if cached data exists.
fields.help: When unchecked, the workflow reuses the most recent crawl data if available. Check this to force a fresh crawl, useful when the source content has changed.
